title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Zepto South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Zepto South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Zepto South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Zepto South Asia Partners:
Zepto South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
